headlines.title: Martin Scorsese’s promotion of AI company called a ‘betrayal’ by directors union
headlines.description: A letter from the Art Director’s Guild accused the acclaimed filmmaker of “turning his back” on the artists who helped him create some of his best work.

headlines.title: Anthropic releases Fable 5 model, built on the same tech that spooked the government
headlines.description: Anthropic released its latest model Tuesday afternoon, heralding the public’s first access to the AI company’s most powerful class of AI systems.

headlines.title: Inside Google’s AI training for teachers
headlines.description: Google flew 70 teachers and administrators to its California headquarters to learn about its AI products — and how to persuade skeptical colleagues to use them.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Brad Paisley criticizes data center planned next to Nashville Zoo
headlines.description: Brad Paisley urged his followers to sign a petition to stop the construction of a 69,000-square-foot data center that would be 50 yards from the zoo.

headlines.title: Apple renames Siri as ‘Siri AI’ with new push into artificial intelligence
headlines.description: The overhaul puts Siri into more direct competition with modern AI assistants such as ChatGPT.

headlines.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declines Warren’s request to testify at AI hearing
headlines.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren had invited Huang to discuss Nvidia’s business in China at a Senate committee meeting about America’s AI industry.

headlines.title: U.S. launches ‘self defense’ strikes on Iran after Apache helicopter shot down
headlines.description: The U.S. launched what it called “self-defense strikes” after an American helicopter was shot down by an Iranian drone over the Strait of Hormuz, as President Trump vowed Iran would “pay the price.” NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ as Iran war continues to spike prices
headlines.description: NBC News Correspondents Monica Alba, Courtney Kube and Brian Cheung join Meet the Press NOW to report on recent developments in the war with Iran after the President Trump vowed to attack the country “hard” again while inflation jumps to its highest point since 2023.

headlines.title: Bugs and black mold: What some mobile home park residents see after investors buy in
headlines.description: In recent years, mobile home properties have become less affordable as an influx of large companies have bought up the parks and raised rents and fees.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Apple Unveils New iPhone Child Safety Features: Get a First Look
headlines.description: Tech giant Apple is announcing a number of new and improved child safety features on iPhones as parents, educators and the government grapple with the effects of technology on young people. Starting in the fall, parents will be able to control which websites are accessible to their kids, restrict app downloads and set limits on how long kids can spend on certain types of apps and block usage during school or mealtimes. NBC’s Savannah Sellers reports for TODAY.
